entries.source_text: gstack unpacked outside the repo; never committed; static read only
acceptance_criteria: no gstack content under the repo tree (grep/ls verification)
no gstack executable/tool/workflow executed during the run

entries.source_text: Full 4-tier static profile of gstack (skill format / bin tools / evals CI / architecture docs), oversized docs skimmed only
acceptance_criteria: findings/tier-{a,b,c,d}-*.md all exist with gstack file citations on material claims
tier-d findings state CHANGELOG/TODOS were skimmed for recency/direction only

entries.source_text: Surface-by-surface comparison report: matrix + three questions answered with two-sided file citations; independently verified
acceptance_criteria: report contains the matrix covering at least: skill format, quality/verification, tooling, docs, memory/context, agent-model config
all three narrative sections present (gstack-better / CT6-better / ideas-to-adopt)
independent reviewer (not the author) verdict: pass — citations resolve on both sides, refuted claims corrected

entries.source_text: Adoption backlog prioritized by value-vs-effort; SR-style actionable items; path recorded in report; nothing implemented this run
acceptance_criteria: adoption-backlog.md exists alongside the report, items ordered by value/effort ratio
each item has title, why, acceptance criteria, scope, suggested route
run diff shows no source/test/doc changes beyond the OpenSpec analysis record

entries.source_text: Repo hygiene (tracked footprint = OpenSpec record only) and full in-chat delivery
scenarios: working tree clean of analysis side-effects
acceptance_criteria: git status in the worktree shows only openspec/changes/gstack-profile-comparison/ (plus gitignored state)
final user-facing message contains the comparison verdicts + backlog summary in full with on-disk paths

testing_authorizations.playwright: N/A — analysis-only run; no frontend requirement in scope (refined brief Scope(out): no implementation, no UI surface). Authorization recorded per Phase 1 rule.
testing_authorizations.dev_api_integration: N/A — analysis-only run; no backend requirement in scope. Authorization recorded per Phase 1 rule.
testing_authorizations.interaction_intuition_map: N/A — no designed screens in scope; Phase -1D was a no-op.
